portrait:
S3|May-26|personality|bphs
Ask: one line of guidance for today(3,new)
Pred: disciplined inward day; Mars with Cancer softness; choose one thing, close other doors; low body yet bright core, precision beats speed(3,day)
Rem: routine + calm space + simple beauty; warm voice, breath, water/softness/gold(3)
Tone: lion in a quiet room; brave, restrained, self-returning(3)
Open: what single clean yes restores your center?(3)
Avoid: proving, haste, emotional overload, scattering(3)
